underlying_goal: Redesign PartClassifier to use Claude Code CLI as LLM backend instead of API keys, making it deployable for companies with Azure-hosted LLMs accessible only through Claude Code terminal
friction_detail: Windows PATH issues with claude.cmd, nested Claude session guard, and transient GitHub DNS resolution failures required workarounds.
brief_summary: User wanted to redesign PartClassifier to use Claude Code CLI instead of API keys with robust batch processing for 20K parts, and got a fully working parallel implementation with batch classification, URL caching, resume capability, and updated docs pushed to GitHub.
